title: eriastrum calocyanum
intro: Eriastrum calocyanum, also known as the purple owl's clover, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and fever, due to its antispasmodic and diaphoretic properties. In traditional medicine, Eriastrum calocyanum is often used to prepare teas, tinctures, and infusions to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of illness.
